title: fissistigma tientangense
intro: Fissistigma tientangense, also known as Tientangense root or Snake root, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Fissistigma tientangense include the relief of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as the treatment of snake bites and other poisonous injuries. In herbal preparations, Fissistigma tientangense is often used in the form of dried roots, decoctions, or infusions, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
